facts: Is something wet? Unlike humans who sweat everywhere, dogs only sweat through the pads of their feet.
There are an estimated 900 million dogs in the world.
Endal was the first dog to ride on the London Eye (the characteristic ferris wheel in London, England), and was also the first known dog to successfully use a ATM machine.
Dogs can be trained to detect cancer and other diseases in humans.
The most popular male dog name is Max, while the most popular female dog name is Bella.
